input.question: What is the average overall evaluation rating per department?

payload.question: What is the average overall evaluation rating per department?

output.sql:
SELECT
  department AS department,
  ROUND(AVG(overall_rating), 2) AS average_overall_rating
FROM evaluations
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY average_overall_rating DESC;

visualization.title: Average Overall Evaluation Rating by Department

payload.sql:
SELECT
  department AS department,
  ROUND(AVG(overall_rating), 2) AS average_overall_rating
FROM evaluations
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY average_overall_rating DESC;
